description_long: This is a tan leather baseball glove with visible signs of use, featuring intricate lacing along the perimeter and webbing. The glove has a deep pocket and a closed web design, providing a secure area for catching balls. The interior palm area is padded and shows printed branding and a signature, while the finger stalls are well-defined and separated for individual finger placement. The exterior displays reinforced stitching and a prominent Wilson brand logo patch in black and gold on the thumb area. The wrist opening is open and lacks a visible closure mechanism, allowing for easy hand insertion. The overall craftsmanship and material quality suggest it is a professional-grade glove suitable for urban sports environments.
description: A tan leather baseball glove with closed webbing, detailed lacing, and a visible Wilson logo patch. The glove features padded finger stalls and a deep catching pocket.
description_view_0: The glove is shown from the thumb side, highlighting the Wilson logo patch, reinforced lacing, and the open wrist area.
description_view_1: This view displays the glove's palm and pocket, showing the printed branding, signature, and the deep, padded catching area.
description_view_2: The glove is seen from the side, emphasizing the closed webbing and the curvature of the finger stalls.
description_view_3: The back of the glove is visible, showcasing the extensive lacing, the Wilson logo patch, and the overall structure of the glove.
attribute_finger_stalls: Five distinct finger stalls, each individually separated and padded, with reinforced stitching along the edges.
attribute_lacing_style: Cross-laced pattern is visible along the webbing, fingers, and perimeter, providing structural integrity and flexibility.
attribute_brand_logo: Wilson brand logo is visible on the thumb area, featuring a black circular patch with gold lettering and border.
attribute_wrist_strap_design: Open wrist design with no visible closure mechanism; the opening is reinforced with lacing for durability.
